title: The Caravan Checkpoint
description: A makeshift toll gate of oil drums and razor wire blocks the dry riverbed. Two guards in mismatched armor lounge in the shade, rifles across their knees, watching you approach.

options.text: Help the guards reset a fallen drum to earn passage
options.result: You heave the toppled oil drum back onto the wire. The lead guard grunts, flips you a few coins for the trouble, and waves you through.

options.text: [Charm 5] Talk your way past — and out of an old contact's debt
options.result: Turns out you know the lead guard's cousin. A few right names later he not only waves you through, he settles an old marker in your favor.

options.text: [Luck] Bluff a hidden escort and dare them to stop you
options.result_success: You let your eyes flick to the ridgeline like backup waits there. They blink first, lower the wire, and even toss you a toll refund to stay friendly.
options.result_fail: They call your bluff. A warning shot goes wide but the second clips you before you're back over the riverbank.
